items.name_en: Mini 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10173B, Size: 18*7.5*12cm

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟New Version🆕 Small Soft Suede Puzzle Edge Handbag
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟New Version🆕 Small Soft Suede Puzzle Edge Handbag
L 🆕 debut handbag*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the unique geometric lines of Puzzle*This small version is made of soft suede and features overlapping edges. The small Puzzle can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, and sunglasses; can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Carried as a handbag or with the top handle*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external rear zip pocket*Zip closure with leather pull tab*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:24*10.5*16CM
Model:062324

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Cotton jacquard Puzzle Fold Handbag
Linen natural color 1762b
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbags, the Puzzle Fold Handbag is reinterpreted with geometric architectural patchwork, fully foldable, making it a perfect travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This version is made of cotton jacquard.
Crossbody or handheld
Synthetic leather lining
LOEWE embroidery
215.5-31cm

Genuine leather

Model:9300 Full Leather
Color:Plum Plain

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 Medium calfskin Anagram Tote handbag, linen patchwork tote features💥 No flashy designs, simple and practical type🌻 The design of the long and short shoulder straps looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big🌹 Easily meets daily needs. In addition to the regular classic shoulder strap😻, it also features a unique woven handle❤️, adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The bag body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo🌺, the recognizability and fashion sense are spot on😘, and it is comfortable and photogenic😍. Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter handmade woven handle🌼. This size version is made of calfskin👜. The front is decorated with a large Anagram💋. "Carried by shoulder or top handle". Calfskin strap fastening* Two internal slip pockets*Calfskin lining⭐️
Dimensions: 29CM~25CM~14CM
Style No.: 9300 Full Leather
Color: Black Plain

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Model 1668A
Paseo, meaning "stroll" in Spanish. Crafted from shiny Nappa calfskin, creating a lazy yet sophisticated vibe
This is likely the most niche bag of 2023!
Some say it looks like a dumpling 🥟, others say it looks like a gold ingot
I think it's a breath of fresh air in the fashion world
Just carry it and be yourself
You won't clash with others; cool and chic, very unique, highly recommended
Available in 2 sizes
Small: 35*21*11.5cm
Paseo has been out for a while, a style worn by the "Big Power" (Megan Fox)
Actually, I didn't think it looked that good just sitting there, but it looks super nice on 👍🏻. Large capacity! Lightweight! Has a zipper! These three points make it perfect for workers
The leather texture is fine and smooth; can be carried by hand or worn on the shoulder
A "sailboat" shape that rarely clashes with others; you will definitely fall in love with it

specs.rawTitle:
Genuine leather
Model 1668A
Paseo, meaning "stroll" in Spanish. Crafted from shiny Nappa calfskin, creating a lazy yet sophisticated vibe
This is likely the most niche bag of 2023!
Some say it looks like a dumpling 🥟, others say it looks like a gold ingot
I think it's a breath of fresh air in the fashion world
Just carry it and be yourself
You won't clash with others; cool and chic, very unique, highly recommended
Available in 2 sizes
Small: 35*21*11.5cm
Paseo has been out for a while, a style worn by the "Big Power" (Megan Fox)
Actually, I didn't think it looked that good just sitting there, but it looks super nice on 👍🏻. Large capacity! Lightweight! Has a zipper! These three points make it perfect for workers
The leather texture is fine and smooth; can be carried by hand or worn on the shoulder
A "sailboat" shape that rarely clashes with others; you will definitely fall in love with it
